tags.description: Good foil spot. Best in SW to W winds. Launch on meadow, walk to opening in riprap. In extreme negative tides, foilers can walk towards S towards deep water channel to access deep. No rocks except right at shore.
tags.name: Kitesurf / foil launch spot

tags.description: Works best at high tide, long walk over mud flat at low tide. Great launch spot for paddles in Chuckanut Bay. About 8 public parking spots slightly up the street.
